issue_summary: Deprecate ZipUtil.signedByteToUnsignedInt(byte) in favor of Byte.toUnsignedInt(byte)
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Converts a signed byte into an unsigned integer representation (e.g., -1 becomes 255).
     *
     * @param b byte to convert to int
     * @return int representation of the provided byte
     * @since 1.5
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Converts a signed byte into an unsigned integer representation (e.g., -1 becomes 255).
     *
     * @param b byte to convert to int
     * @return int representation of the provided byte
     * @since 1.5
     * @deprecated Use {@link Byte#toUnsignedInt(byte)}.
     */
